segment-text: HELLO-KITTY WAVES AT US Pulsing neon on massive billboard. Seen through a window. It's fluorescent arm wagging. Left. Right. Left. Right. We SHUDDER. And GASP...
I want to talk retirement. The accent, proper London.
...THEN BLINK:
A LUXURY SEDAN. NIGHT
Navigates the glitz at Shibuya Crossing. Surge of pedestrians. Beneath mammoth video screens. Shoppers. Tourists. Manic detonation of color and fashion. TOKYO. Brash Texan drawl,
Thought we discussed that yesterday?
Silhouetted in the backseat.
Completely still. Watches through closed window. Thrumming gloss smearing her reflection.
We started.
And we'll finish soon's you close the Tokyo deal.
Plexiglass isolating her from Driver. Ink peeking from collar, curving up his neck. Dialing wheel. Away from the Station.
You said that before Berlin. It starts raining...
8FLiX.com SCREENPLAY DATABASE HOTEL ROOM. LATER
Floor-to-ceiling window. Polychromatic light irradiates from without. Modern. Practical. Antiseptic.
I said you should consider a vacation. Think I suggested Bora Bora. Subtle movement. Someone's here... Calmly thawing from the murk. She's been here. Swathed in shadow. Took this long to notice.

Sharks, pythons, paralysis ticks. Bora Bora's a deathtrap. I don't want a vacation, I want to talk exit strategies and insurance; thirty-two years, Varrick, I want to talk severance. Uttered with flat prosody.
38 floors up. Reflecting on the city below.
Wafers of light delineate her. We get our first look.
They tell me retirement's the most efficient murderer of elder folk.
Piercing cobalt gaze. Calm. Expressionless. Cold.
Unnervingly static. Barely has a pulse.
That why you're still working? Even the blinks are deliberate.
I never stop to think about it. Coolly regarding the city. Or herself. Mileage in the eyes only she gleans.
8FLiX.com SCREENPLAY DATABASE
But that's what you've been doin'? Her reflection hovering over Tokyo.
A ghost haunting the metropolis.
Still there? No evidence of respiration. Kate...
Her head tilts fractionally. Eyeing her wristwatch.
HOTEL BAR. LATER
Untouched drink before her. Cell to ear, this is the convo.
Alright tell you what, I'll divert my flight to Tokyo tomorrow and we're gonna talk then.
We're already talking. Japanese salarymen. Few gaijin.
One spying her from a stool over.
And I've already done as discussed, HR's assured me they're drawin' up the insurance papers and-- Look, you're our ace closer, Kate, so don't give 'em a reason now and bring this home like always.
Complete severance consolidation. Deep exhale on the other end.
Tomorrow, face-to-face.
Get it done.
She ends the call.
8FLiX.com SCREENPLAY DATABASE
They must be killing you. You haven't even touched your drink.
THE AMERICAN sitting beside. Kate's glare frigid. Before returning to her cell.
Whoa, back up, total pick up line. (putting up hands) Been here a week, heard English and keyed in. Involuntary, I swear.
Scoops his drink, shifting away.
I believe you.
Faux brow wipe, 'Whew'.
That scary? Couldn't risk it being misconstrued as flirtation.
Oh, no, that's not-KATE Ice-bitch British bureaucrat, I get it.
No, no, just didn't want it misconstrued as bad flirtation.
Kate gives him a relaxed once-over. He beams. Offers a hand. Stephen.
She considers before taking it. Angela.
Sliding closer.
No soul-stabbing, work-related talk, I promise.
8FLiX.com SCREENPLAY DATABASE
I mean, who on their deathbed's ever said, "I wish I'd worked more"?
Everyone who didn't make partner? He's mouthing, 'Ha ha.' Slugging the rest.
Gesturing for another.
They keep trying to placate me with vacations.
Vacations! Mm-Dipping into the fourth. No good?
Alright, look, I wasn't always Captain Skeptical. First vacation, Nassau, I came back and proclaimed it a paradigm shift.
Wow. Sounds affirming.
Last year, Caracas, unbearable.
Sure. Most violent city in the world. 119 homicides per 100k.
Uh, right. I meant the vacations themselves. Each one a time out, to reflect. On who you could've been, if only you'd gone that way instead of this. If it's too late for that.
8FLiX.com SCREENPLAY DATABASE
Path not taken, it's a vicious chestnut.
Every year that person dies a little. Then it's all over. Is anyone gonna care we were here?
Consider retirement.
A pensive swig.
This profession, my career... that's not such an easy call.
Till it's too late for that guy.
Raising his glass.
To getting out. Before our bodies fail us.
You're a bit adorable, Stephen. (off his look) That was flirtation.
BACK IN HER ROOM
Filtered lights playing across them. MUCH LATER
Bedside clock blinks 11:59 PM.
Kate stands there watching it. Alarm vibrates at midnight. For a second. She taps it off. Nudging Stephen with her foot. Asleep in a sheet tangle. Comes alive with a yawn.
What time is it?
For you to leave.
8FLiX.com SCREENPLAY DATABASE
Squints at her standing by window. Marshals a playful smile.
How was it?
She nods to small cash wad.
There's extra.
On his feet now, dressing.
Was it okay? I riffed on what you specified. Tried to make it honest.
Her silence killing his smile.
We're not that different, you know. In what we want.
Glare neglected, she's facing the city. He snatches the cash. Pads out.
BATHROOM
Fogged. She showers. Methodic. Economical. We catch fractions of her body. Horrific swirls of scar tissue.
Kills the spray. Hands paste nicotine patch on thorax. It's concave.
BUZZ. PRELAP the door buzzer.
HOTEL ROOM. NEXT MOMENT

BELLBOY enters, pushing trolley. Squints, adjusting to ambiance. Kate seated across, facing him. Backlit. One leg draped over the other. Calmly pulling on gloves. Watching. 8FLiX.com SCREENPLAY DATABASE FOR EDUCATIONAL USE ONLY He only discerns her silhouette. Bows. Exits quickly. She stays. Another moment... Then moves. Three perfect strides.
At the trolley.

Ignores food, lifts the wine. Checks vintage. Pops. Pours. Exactly a quarter glass. No more. No less. Sips. Not to her liking. Nostril flare gives it away. Swirls lightly. Pulling A PELICAN CASE from bottom section. Keys her phone. Unlocking case. Click. Electronic bolts unlatch. An SGW Scope Rifle housed in velvet. In four clean sections. Beside ear-piece. She eyes it. Drains the glass. MOMENTS LATER Kate assembles the gun. A magician. Precise. 4 seconds.
Cleans two rounds with pristine napkin.
Not a trace. EVEN LATER

She dresses before mirror. Meticulous as a bomb tech. Perfectly fitting a monochromatic outfit. Slacks. Shirt. Crisp collar, unbent. Without wrinkle. Or blemish. Her diligence like a soldier donning uniform. Or, armor. Keen eyes absorb her reflection. Finally, an expression... Barest hint of a frown. On her shirt, a spec. A flaw.
She fastidiously undresses. The shirt must go.
AZABU-JUBAN STREETS. DAWN
Old wealth. Upscale. Yet earthy. Sheeting rain. Sidewalk already mobbed. Jostling crush of umbrellas. A parka-clad figure cuts through. Even pace. No umbrella. Case in left hand.
It's Kate.
Seasonal on point.
Into ear-piece. Lips never moving.
(anonymous, feminine) Copy. Building 2-8-14.
Diverting down an alley. Crooked narrow slope.
Toward row of tenements.
Tokyo Tower looms east. Over sparse foot traffic. She nears specified building.
Northernmost service elevator. You're clear.
Shrugs off parka without slowing. It pools behind her in the rain She's already in the elevator. Doors erasing her from sight.
INSIDE BUILDING HALL Gentrified renovations. 8FLiX.com SCREENPLAY DATABASE
Kate glides in. Outfit jibing. No second looks.
Stage mark. VOICE
Roof, northeast corner.
Every step exact. Calculated.
Evading surveillance cams with ease. Effortless caution.
ROOF
Kate emerging through shaftway door. Moving beneath roof awnings. Pulling on gloves. Reaching corner, crouching. Case open, starts assembly.
BDG trajectory.
500 meters at 45. Southeast at 27. Doesn't bother with a 'Copy'. Just inserts the two rounds.
Gets into sniper kneel.
Sites focus on a RESIDENCE.
Scant bystanders. CAR parked nearby.
BDG acquired.
Copy. We're holding. Sites scan surroundings.
Through tempering rain. Holds on ANOTHER PARKED CAR. Far side of the residence. TWO WOMEN inside eating yakitori.
Secondaries on this? Nothing outstanding about them. To us.
She notices the stares.
VOICE
Possible third-Caught by abrupt tightness in throat.
She coughs to clear the phlegm. Strains hard to swallow.
Seasonal, repeat.
Kate distracted now. Puzzled. Feels it before we notice. The sweat on her forehead. Breaths audibly hissing though nostrils. Something's wrong...
Possible third-party on scene-ANGRY BOUT OF PAIN. Suddenly zapping her stomach, head. Eyes seizing shut. Blasting open with alarm. She grinds enamel. Biting back the pain.
Disregard. No engagement unless.
Then a COUGHING SPASM. BLOODY. Flecks her shirt.
Seasonal, report. Violent bolt of light.
Flashing in her head. Blinding her a second. She's STAGGERING UP. DOUBLING right back over. Unbelievable pain.
Spitting a lie.
Holding at yellow.

A WHINE swelling rapidly. Becomes RINGING in ears. Vision distorting bad. Pulses DARK again. VOICE Primary exiting. 6 second window. Kate recovering in a whirl. Dizzy. Dazed. Unable to grasp what's happening. Bracing herself. Something going horribly wrong.
Primary visible. Black jacket. Snapped out of it.
Back on the rifle.
Jaw clench. Refocus. Deep breath. In and out. On two men emerging from residence. Blue jacket. Black.
Seasonal, you are green.
But her focal point BLURS. Tracking bad with movement. Blue jacket now in driver's.
Seasonal...
Kate forcing herself to reorient.
Kate gone fetal.
Car moving away...
Window closed. Seasonal, you are red. Body in full-blown revolt.
Kate not accustomed to it's insubordination.
Seasonal, acknowledge deal
Panting hoarsely on her back... VOICE (CONT'D) Seasonal, confirm nonfulfillment. As the implication registers.
She sucks air, rallying for resolve. Refusing to cede. Willing herself up.
Negative, Seasonal. You're-New point.
Beat. Holding.
Kate snagging the rifle. Throwing strap over shoulder. Breaking into steady run.
Jumps five feet of air. Smashing into lower clearing.
8FLiX.com SCREENPLAY DATABASE
Taking position.
Car turning off small street. Towards highway.
Seasonal, you are not cleared for shot.
HEART JACKHAMMERING. Eyes dilating big. Losing her knees. Warping backwards.
Car rounding corner. Vanishing.
Seasonal, you...
A VIOLENT HUM. Overwhelming all sound. Kate grimacing.
Quick 360.
Approximating target course. Shoves into a sprint. Doused now. Feet thrashing water. Hum enduring. Shards of breathing cut through.
Rain streaking ocular.
She jumps another roof... Barely makes it. Slip-skidding towards corner. Starts the sweep.
Scanning. Scanning. Scan-There.
Car amidst knot of traffic.
8FLiX.com SCREENPLAY DATABASE

Front tire POPS. Wild SWERVE. Car whips outta control. Caroming into sidewalk. One behind sinking into it's trunk Kate INHALES. Sound snapping back with a vengeance. Accompanies pain. Inciting facial twitch.
SCOPE

Driver exiting. Black jacket yelling from backseat. Traffic stalled. Commuters converging. 3 second window. Maybe. Kate aims. Sudden THROB of black. Sends her flailing. Lost in residual blindness. Window closing. On her last round... Kate trying to detect with sound. Blood pounding in ears. Making it impossible. Wobbling to one knee. Holds her breath. Pure intuition. Kate FIRES... RED SPLOTCH replaces target in window. Driver freaks. Ducks. SCREAMS. Bystanders point. Scatter. A PAIR already converging. One she noticed in parked car. They're on the corpse. Sifting pockets. Kate's up and moving. Rifle abandoned there. Sun breaking over Tokyo Tower.
REAR ALLEY
Kate hunched over. RETCHING.
8FLiX.com SCREENPLAY DATABASE
FOR EDUCATIONAL USE ONLY Catching a palmful.

CONVULSIONS rippling through her core. Teeth gnashed to keep from roaring. Everything tilting. Feet swimming for purchase. Till her back meets a wall. Slides down it. Knees drawn up. Eyes shut. Chest heaving. Cacophony of SIRENS. Merging fast. Kate blinks up. She's gotta move.
ON THE STREET
Kate negotiating sidewalk. Tree-chameleon eyes scan surrounding. Head does not.
COP CARS doppler past.

One decelerating. Cops eyeballing sidewalk. Kate perfectly obscured. By a Businessman exiting his Mercedes. Impeccably timed. Cops coasting on. Kate thumbing phone without looking. Resembles a phone anyway. The Mercedes unlocking as she nears. Alarm deactivated. Kate opening door, sliding in. Not a missed beat.
Plugging a dummy key. Ported to phone device. Eyes forward. Normal. Natural. Nothing going on here. Device coming alive. Running a script. Number combos scroll. Searching for start code.
8FLiX.com SCREENPLAY DATABASE

COP CAR coming back around. Cops scanning thoroughly. Creeping this way... Recurring JAB of pain. Involuntary SHUDDER. Cops looking over... Kate BITING cheek. Hard. Recovering within millisecond. Cops floating past. BEEP. She presses start button. Drives off.
MINATO STREETS Raft of traffic.
Drifting steady.
Towards Shuto Expressway.
Mercedes in the seam.
Kate retaining cool... Until it spikes. Withering pain. Dismantling her senses. Stomach clenching.
In violent agony. Sways her head. Eyes lulling. MERCEDES VEERING WILDLY. Left. Right. SCRAPES flanking cars. Then SCREECHES ahead. Pain mounting rapidly.
Runaway train heartbeat.
Pulse roaring. Fast as the Mercedes engine. Speedometer tilting north of 200 km/h.
Carving wild through Tokyo.
Eyes searing on road ahead.
Against system failure wracking her body.
8FLiX.com SCREENPLAY DATABASE

Sudden SURGE. Her teeth GNASH. Eyes CINCH. AND A SHARD OF MEMORY SLICES IN Abrupt. Violent. Lightning flash of images. A YOUNGER KATE takes a beating. Indistinct faces hovering. Muffled voices. Kate gritting through. Defiant. Then back! Kate JOLTING out of it. Flushed. Rocked. Sucking breath. And oh fuck-Car's ERUPTED from lane. THRASHING through. Straight at a Mitsukoshi store... Kate YANKING wheel. Last second. Hairpin turn.
Mercedes mounting curb.

Pedestrians leaping aside. Kate's throat constricting. To fight back rising bile. Tears blasting down cheeks. Absolute agony etched in her gaze. Mercedes fishtailing onto road. Kate manic with intensity. Trying to will away the pain.
Pedal stuck to the mat. Speedometer top-lining. EXPLODING through a red light. Chorus of honks in her wake. SHRIEKING outta control. Then BLACK... As her heart quits on her. Head crashing into wheel.
WHAM!

Mercedes HURTLING end-over-end. Landing in a crushing explosion. Of glass, metal, flames. Honks. Screeches. Chaos. And through the dissolving smoke. We see KATE. Strapped into seat. Hanging upside down.
8FLiX.com SCREENPLAY DATABASE
Motionless. Lifeless. A long beat...
ANOTHER DISTORTED MEMORY FRAGMENT
LIVING ROOM. KID KATE on the couch, bloodsoaked face. Flanked by her parents. BOTH DEAD. A stately WOMAN sits across with a gun. This is MOTHER. We'll never see her face. Posh English:
What would you do if I let you go?
Kate's face, a fizz of fury.
I'd kill you.
Mother's LIPS unfurling into a smirk,
You're going to like your new home. Then we're GASPING out.

Blinking. Painfully. Everything a blur. Slowly coming into focus. Fog lifting. Adjusting. Discerning surroundings. In A HOSPITAL BED. Cordoned by PLASTIC CURTAINS. Donning patient gown. Mesh of IVs. Bleeping monitors. Not a room...
Expansive. Empty. Excepting her bed. Like all the others were removed.
Abrupt SHOUTING in Japanese. Someone noticing her awake, alerting others. NEXT MOMENT SIX MEN IN HAZMAT SUITS. Blink at us. Beep. Beep. Beep...
8FLiX.com SCREENPLAY DATABASE
Kate deadpans back. Battered and broken. Rigged to wires, tubes. Sudden explosion of CHATTER. Rapid-fire Japanese. A dizzying babel. Getting heated.
Kate looking after...
MORE PEOPLE IN HAZMAT SUITS. A dozen now. Fierce clamor. All squabbling over her. Then big GASPS. As A MAN cuts through.
Marching straight to Kate. Rips aside the plastic. Consulting his clipboard.
Canadian passport. Says your name is Angela Witten. Is that correct? Gets nothing for it. Points at the hazmat suits.

Sorry about the precautions, Angela, I'm a specialist here and need to ask you a few questions. (gesturing over) Are you still doing radioactive therapy for your mastectomy? Slow shake in the negative.
Have you had any recent exposure to radioactive materials? Maybe you work near such a place? No.
Because your blood is in a rare state of mutation, overrun, with viciously radioactive isotopes.
Pauses for a reaction.
Considering the velocity of decay, and the sheer potency, it was most likely injected directly into your bloodstream. (meaning) You were poisoned, Angela. Poisoned?

It's lethal, I'm afraid. There is no treatment for this, no antidote, it is already too late. I can't imagine what it must be like to hear this, Miss Witten, but I want to make sure you understand what I'm telling you?
What are you telling me?
That you have been murdered. It is now simply a matter of your heart receiving the unfortunate news. Everyone staring at Kate. Uneasy silence ballooning...
The pain is utterly unmanageable without these morphine drips so-He trails off... Because Kate's on her feet. Refusing the verdict. Tearing off IVs. Tubes. Wires. Walking out. Just like that.
Staggering outta her way. Reacting loudly.
8FLiX.com SCREENPLAY DATABASE
Kate making it to entrance.
Spinning her into orbit. She persists. Tottering,
INTO THE HALLWAY
PERSONNEL here reacting big. Mouths are covered. Pointed fingers. Yells. Kate lurches on. One step. As far as she gets.
Wilting to the floor.
Kate getting assailed.
Her eyes BUNCHING,
THROUGH ANOTHER IMPRESSIONISTIC MEMORY
OPERATING ROOM. YOUNG KATE being operated on by TWO SURGEONS. Mammogram x-rays on wall. It's a PREVENTATIVE MASTECTOMY.
Simplify. Resolve problems before they can become problems. Left wrist handcuffed to it. Only two men here now. Specialist. And Plainclothes Officer. Specialist translating for him,

Detective Sanada here wants to know who we can contact? Besides your entry on a flight from Berlin, there are no records linked to your passport. And no emergency contacts or power of attorney listed on your work visa.
SANADA continues, holding up Kate's cell. SNAPPING OUT:
Your phone is locked, and the car you were driving was stolen. (pausing for last bit) Stolen near a crime scene, a murderSanada clarifies.
An assassination. But Kate's not listening.
I was poisoned recently? Very.
The manner, you mean? Could've been anything, an injection, a drink... Sanada wants to know,
Who may have wanted to kill you? Mumbles without looking.
You mean in Tokyo?
Eliciting a stutter from Sanada.
Who are you?
What happens now?
It will get worse. Rapidly. The morphine is managing the pain now, but in one hour it will be intolerable. In two it will be blinding. Within six hours you will be unable to process thought.
How much time do I have?
It's hard to say, really, it could-How much?
14 hours, maybe 15. But you won't be seeing the sunrise, Angela. That lands on her. If you know where to look. Her chance to start over. Any hope for a different life. All gone. Just like that.
The men look on somberly.
(subtitles italicized) So she has to stay on the morphine?
We'll keep inflating the dosage, but at some point the pain will overcome it. Before it gets there we would-(clears throat) We suggest euthanasia.
Kate glancing up now. He's suggesting she lay down and die. Before it gets worse.
To fade away quietly.
What blunts the pain, allows mobility?
You're already on morphine-KATE No depressants. I want stimulants.
Miss, you are not leaving this room.
Name the drugs.
8FLiX.com SCREENPLAY DATABASE
There's thebaine, like morphine but a stimulant, oxycodone of course, a morphine derivative, also-KATE Give me the cocktail.

Miss Witten, there is no way. These drugs, they may dull the pain but will greatly accelerate the decay. (holding up her cell) See this battery, this is your life right now, minimal usage may get you through the night, but the more you exert, faster you'll expend it.
Kate clocking the phone display.
That's how much time I have left, 52%?
More or less. Probably less.
Kate growls at Sanada,
Hand him the keys.
She's got a Ruger on his thigh. His Ruger. He blinks down at his empty holster.
Angela, please-- This is crazy!
It's on your femoral, I pull this trigger and you'll die before I do. Give him the keys. (to Specialist) Unlock me. Sanada awed. Specialist obliging.
Gag him, cuff him in my place. Snapping up her phone.
Where are the drugs?
8FLiX.com SCREENPLAY DATABASE HOSPITAL MEDICINE ROOM
Closets thrown open. Specialist snatching vials, syringes, pills. Kate standing aside. IVs still threaded into arm. Fluid packets in one hand.
Mix them up. Load them into shots. She's ripping off IVs. Snatching his coat.
Your wallet too.
She's shoving the shots into coat pockets. He's pleading, sheer professional compassion.

Angela, please, it is corroding your insides! The hemorrhaging will cause bleeding of the gums, tooth decay. There will be body sores, muscular atrophy, impairing sight and ability to speak. And if you're lucky, your heart will give out. (earnest) What is it that you want to do?
I want to know who killed me?
STEAK KNIFE PINNING BELLBOY'S HAND TO WALL A palm clamping his mouth. Stifling the scream. Kate this close to his face. She's decided not to. Fade away quietly, i.e.
Saliva, tears. Bellboy mewls.
English? (taps his temple) With your head, yes or no. He nods yes.
Her tone academic.
Four vital arteries in your hand. I twist half a millimeter and you'll bleed out in 6 minutes. Understand?
I'm going to ask yes or no questions. I want yes or no answers. You don't answer, I kill you. I think you're lying, I kill you. Understand?
A trembling yes.
You remember me? Yes.
Remember what you delivered? Yes.
Did you put it together? Yes.
Her grip tightens. He quivers with dread.
Were you hired to poison me?
His eyes dilating huge. Shaking 'No', whiplash fast. She removes her hand.
Where did you get the wine?
Boss-- the boss give me the wine, Kate stark-still.
Eyes digging for veracity. Bellboy swallowing hard.
But he off today, the boss is home, I give you his address, he's the manager, I give you-- okay?
8FLiX.com SCREENPLAY DATABASE
Free hand patting chest pocket. Pulling order-pad, pen. Scribbling. Forking it over. Kate snatching a napkin. Gagging his mouth.
Yanking the knife. Bellboy swooning with pain. Kate pulling napkin from mouth. Shoving it into his wrist.
Soak it in paraffin, stitch it. Leaving him coiling to the ground. KATE (PRELAP) (CONT'D) Why did you poison me?
LUXURY MEGURO APARTMENT
A family shrivels on the floor. Mother. Teenage boy. Gawking. Father on his feet. Bowing repeatedly. The hotel MANAGER.
Please, I don't understand.
Kate at the kitchen counter. Ruger resting there. Twisting open oxycodone tube. Pills spilling out.
Who asked you to poison me?
I don't know what you mean, please. Crushing pills with bottom of glass. Sweeping them into the water.
Swallowing clean.
Who picked out the wine? MANAGER The-- I pick out the wine.
The wine cellar, it's-KATE Who else has access?
Just me. I have sole key to cellar.
Who told you to pick it out?
No one tell me, it was specified in the room reservation. By who?
I don't know, I-- those reservations come through computer.
Who enters them on the other end?
They all come from... (a beat, as it dawns) ...Our owners. The Sumiyoshi Clan.
Yakuza. I want a name.
Name? I don't know names, I told you it's through computer-KATE The Sumiyoshis, you deal with one of their people, give me the name.
Kate walking over.
But-- I can't! You don't-KATE I'll start with your family. It will hurt.
8FLiX.com SCREENPLAY DATABASE
Her tone flat, inflectionless. His eyes going big.
What-- no, please! I can't-KRAK!
Wife SHRIEKS. Shot through shoulder. He yells, dropping beside her. Kid wailing.
Stop, please!
Ruger panning to the Kid. Smoke curling from barrel.
The kid's next.
Manager's eyes inflating huge. Throwing himself across his kid.
You're crazy! Stop, please, I'll give you name!
Kate considers him impassively. Gun still on the kid.
Sato-san-- his name is Kujun Sato!
Kate suddenly BLANCHING. Grinding through pain surge. Everyone eyeing the gun. Knuckles whitening around it.
I deal with him sometimes, Sato, he's a Sumiyoshi shatei-- a lieutenant, I don't know anything else! Now please, the gun...
She sights down her gun arm. Regards the tense grip.
Look what you did to her! Look what you did to my wife!
8FLiX.com SCREENPLAY DATABASE
Kate walking out sans a look.
She'll live.
KICHIJOJI STATION
A Musashino city bus pulling away. Shoal of passengers moving in it's wake. A COUPLE in the midst. STEPHEN with an AMERICAN WOMAN. His 'john'. Hand in hand. Turning into side street.
Towards residential block.
Laughing. Buzzed. Someone watching from afar...
APARTMENT COMPLEX
Woman leading them inside. Figure across the street...
APARTMENT BEDROOM
Woman grinding atop Stephen.
SLAM! Door plows open. Specter coasting in.
Woman leaping off.
Muffling a scream. PICTURES on dresser. Of them both. They're A COUPLE. Huh. Kate's eyes doing new math.
Do you love her? Ruger in Stephen's face.
Terror choking his response...
Who are you!? Who is she?!
Do you. Love. Her?
8FLiX.com SCREENPLAY DATABASE
Yes-- Yes I love her!
APARTMENT BALCONY
Woman DANGLES head-first off railing. Mouth taped. Wind WHIPPING. Stirring her into WRITHING frenzy. Kate holding her by one foot.
I swear I didn't poison you! I-you didn't even touch your drink!
Who do you work for?
You hired me, through the website, that's how it works.
Who owns it?
No one, I only deal with the clients, no one else!
Kate laxing her grip slightly. Woman slipping several inches. Smothered screams echoing through tape.
No! Please-- stop!
Who set it up, who manages it?
Her, she does, my wife!
Kate's eyes skidding across his face. Stephen sobbing now. Disgorging all.
We needed money, okay, we needed money bad. And I was always good at this stuff, you know, listening, talking, providing comfort.
8FLiX.com SCREENPLAY DATABASE
Kate's grip wavering.
You were our out! The last client. We have enough to retire from this now, start over different.

Kate absorbing this... Tightening grip. Straining. Hauling up the Woman. Stephen rushing over. Embracing, soothing her. BLOOD DRIPPING on him. PUDDLING at their feet. He's checking his wife. Not hers. It's GUSHING from Kate's nose, mouth.
BATHROOM
Wife idles in doorway. Kate at the sink. Swabbing nose. Stephen handing her peroxide.
Rinse your mouth with this. Kate gargling.
Spitting mouthful of diluted blood. Something RATTLING in sink. A tooth. Kate trying to catch it.
It slips down the drain. She stares at her reflection. Cuts. Bruises. Sallow face. Drawn eyes. Barely recognizable.
Someone did this to you?
Genuine concern on Woman's face. Stephen with a gallows chuckle.
Guess it's too late for you.
Kate still fixed on reflection. He articulates softly.
To retire, I mean. No getting out now. Discovering that person. Harkening to their existential tete-a-tete.
Kate giving it a ponder... Her cell BUZZING.
But they're gonna know I was here.
Who... who's gonna know? Snatching cell, stalking out. Everyone.
